title: Plagiogyria distanta
taxonomy: Plagiogyria distanta belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the polypody ferns. The genus Plagiogyria is a part of this family and is distributed mainly in tropical regions of Asia. Plagiogyria distanta is a species of epiphytic fern characterized by its distinct leaf morphology and growth habits. This species is classified under the category of lycopods, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta. Further classification of Plagiogyria distanta includes its kingdom as Plantae, with the phylum being Pteridophyta and the class as Polypodiopsida.
